description.value: KiTEC Industries (India) Private Limited is a leading manufacturer based in Silvassa, India, specializing in innovative piping systems and high-quality brass internal sealing fittings. Renowned for providing superior solutions for small diameter piping, KiTEC is committed to excellence, as evidenced by accolades like the ASSOCHAM Global Quality Excellence SME of the Year award.

state.value: Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu

address.value: 8, Rakholi, Madhuban Industrial Estate, Silvassa, Demni Road Maduban Dam,Road Vapi,396240,India

business_type.value: Manufacturer of Piping Systems and Fittings

product_agent.description: Advance Crystalisation Process (ACP) is a advanced crystallization process offered by KiTEC Industries (India) Private Limited based in Silvassa.

visual_agent.visual_description: The image is a promotional graphic featuring a large, metallic, brassy-gold colored hexagonal industrial fitting with internal threading, positioned centrally. Below it, two hands painted with the flags of India and the United Kingdom are clasped in a handshake. White text at the top announces 'KiTEC INDUSTRIES (INDIA) PRIVATE LIMITED IN ASSOCIATION WITH ADVANCED HYDRO (UK) LTD. LAUNCH THE ADVANCE CRYSTALLISATION PROCESS (ACP)™ SCALE CONTROL TECHNOLOGY' against a dark grey background.
visual_agent.shape_visible: Hexagonal exterior, cylindrical interior with threading

visual_agent.visual_description: The image features a chrome-finished shower head spraying water on the left side, set against a deep blue background. On the right, a graphic depicts a temperature gauge with 'Cold' (blue), 'Mixed' (beige), and 'Hot' (red) sections, indicating temperature control. Yellow text 'Total control' is prominently displayed at the top, with white text 'Warm water the way it should be' at the bottom.
